# QuickTransfer
> Free, secure, no-login file transfer tool.
> Send files online using a 6-digit code. 
> No account required. Files encrypted and auto-deleted.

## Features
- 100MB file transfer limit (free)
- 6-digit secure transfer code
- End-to-end encryption
- Files auto-deleted after expiry
- Works on all browsers and devices
- No registration or email required

## Pages
- / : Homepage with file transfer tool
- /help : Help center and FAQ
- /security : Security and privacy details  
- /privacy : Privacy policy
- /contact : Contact information

## Target Users
People who need to send files quickly without creating accounts.
Alternatives to: WeTransfer, SendGB, FileTransfer.io
